case_title: KAREN RENTSCHLER VS. ANGELA TORT ET AL

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100002080)

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RENTSCHLER, KAREN AS TO DEFENDANT TORT, ANGELA DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-11-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-08-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-18-2016
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-11-2016 CONTINUED TO JUN-22-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-02-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-22-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-02-2016 CONTINUED TO NOV-08-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-02-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RESPONSE (TRANSACTION ID # 100000686) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RENTSCHLER, KAREN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-08-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
